button_primary.description: Botón de navegación y acción estándar. Forma píldora.
button_primary.css: .btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 40px; padding: 0 24px; background: oklch(0.66 0.19 48); color: oklch(0.985 0.005 85); border: none; border-radius: 26px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.01em; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), transform 100ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 1, 1); } .btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.56 0.17 46); } .btn-primary:active { background: oklch(0.46 0.14 45); transform: scale(0.98); } .btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.66 0.19 48); outline-offset: 2px; }

button_cta.description: CTA principal 'Apartar esta moto'. Ancho completo, radius de card.
button_cta.css: .btn-cta { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 100%; height: 56px; padding: 0 24px; background: oklch(0.66 0.19 48); color: oklch(0.985 0.005 85); border: none; border-radius: 18px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), transform 100ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 1, 1); } .btn-cta:hover { background: oklch(0.56 0.17 46); } .btn-cta:active { background: oklch(0.46 0.14 45); transform: translateY(1px); } .btn-cta:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; transform: none; }

button_ghost.description: Acción secundaria. Sin fondo, borde Línea de Piso.
button_ghost.css: .btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; height: 36px; padding: 0 14px; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.145 0.004 65); border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0.002 85); border-radius: 10px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), border-color 150ms; } .btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(0.97 0.003 85); border-color: oklch(0.556 0 0 / 0.4); }

badge_disponible.description: Estado moto disponible. Solo en tarjeta y ficha.
badge_disponible.css: .badge-disponible { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 4px 10px; background: oklch(0.65 0.17 145 / 0.12); color: oklch(0.45 0.14 145); border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.03em; }

badge_apartada.css: .badge-apartada { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 4px 10px; background: oklch(0.73 0.17 65 / 0.12); color: oklch(0.46 0.14 45); border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.03em; }

moto_card.description: Tarjeta del catálogo. Sin sombra en reposo. Hover lift con sombra.
moto_card.html:
Disponible

Kawasaki Ninja 400

$95,000
moto_card.css: .moto-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; background: oklch(0.985 0.005 85); border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0.002 85); border-radius: 18px; overflow: hidden; transition: box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; } .moto-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 8px 32px oklch(0.145 0.004 65 / 0.12); transform: translateY(-2px); } .moto-card__image { position: relative; aspect-ratio: 4 / 3; width: 100%; overflow: hidden; background: oklch(0.97 0.003 85); } .moto-card__image img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; } .moto-card__body { padding: 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .moto-card__name { font-family: 'Oxanium', monospace; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.2; color: oklch(0.145 0.004 65); margin: 0; overflow: hidden; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; } .moto-card__price { font-family: 'Oxanium', monospace; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; color: oklch(0.66 0.19 48); margin: 0; }

spec_table.description: Tabla de especificaciones técnicas en la ficha de detalle.
spec_table.css: .spec-table { border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0.002 85); border-radius: 18px; overflow: hidden; } .spec-table__header { padding: 12px 20px; background: oklch(0.97 0.003 85); border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0.002 85); font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(0.556 0 0); margin: 0; } .spec-table__list { margin: 0; } .spec-table__row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: baseline; padding: 12px 20px; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0.002 85); } .spec-table__row:last-child { border-bottom: none; } .spec-table__row dt { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.556 0 0); } .spec-table__row dd { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.145 0.004 65); margin: 0; }

whatsapp_fab.description: FAB fijo de WhatsApp. Semántica de contacto exclusivamente.
whatsapp_fab.css: .whatsapp-fab { position: fixed; bottom: 24px; right: 24px; z-index: 50; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 56px; height: 56px; background: oklch(0.74 0.20 148); color: #ffffff; border-radius: 9999px; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px oklch(0.74 0.20 148 / 0.35); text-decoration: none; transition: transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), box-shadow 150ms; } .whatsapp-fab:hover { transform: scale(1.10); } .whatsapp-fab:active { transform: scale(0.95); }

apartar_warning.description: Aviso cuando la moto está apartada. No es un botón deshabilitado.
apartar_warning.html:
Esta moto ya fue apartada

Alguien ya reservó esta moto. Contáctanos por WhatsApp para ver disponibilidad o explorar otras opciones.
apartar_warning.css: .apartar-warning { display: flex; gap: 12px; padding: 16px; background: oklch(0.73 0.17 65 / 0.08); border: 1px solid oklch(0.73 0.17 65 / 0.3); border-radius: 18px; } .apartar-warning__icon { color: oklch(0.73 0.17 65); flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 2px; } .apartar-warning__title { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.145 0.004 65); margin: 0 0 4px; } .apartar-warning__body { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; color: oklch(0.556 0 0); margin: 0; line-height: 1.5; }

gallery_main.description: Imagen principal de la galería en la ficha de detalle.
gallery_main.css: .gallery-main { position: relative; aspect-ratio: 4 / 3; width: 100%; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 18px; background: oklch(0.97 0.003 85); }

gallery_thumb.description: Thumbnail de galería. Active: borde primario. Inactive: opacidad 60%.
gallery_thumb.css: .gallery-thumb { position: relative; aspect-ratio: 4 / 3; width: 72px; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; border: 2px solid transparent; transition: border-color 150ms, opacity 150ms; flex-shrink: 0; } .gallery-thumb.is-active { border-color: oklch(0.66 0.19 48); opacity: 1; } .gallery-thumb:not(.is-active) { opacity: 0.6; } .gallery-thumb:not(.is-active):hover { opacity: 0.85; }
